name: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A - Ameris DVA Medtech Fund
summary: Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A - Ameris DVA Medtech Fund is an investment fund focusing on the Medtech industry. It is managed by Ameris Capital Administradora General de Fondos S.A. and aims to generate returns through investments in companies related to medical technology.
